summary: A Fox News alert clip showing a woman anchor at left and an enlarged screenshot of an email at right, with several lines redacted and a highlighted sentence reading 'Keep that head up, this too shall pass. Will make for a great chapter in your memoirs some day!'. A 'LIVE' label and 'FOX NEWS ALERT' banner are shown.

script.scene: A woman anchor at left and an email screenshot at right with a highlighted sentence about a memoir; 'FOX NEWS ALERT' banner.

notable_text: Keep that head up, this too shall pass. Will make for a great chapter in your memoirs some day!; FOX NEWS ALERT
